notes: Validation export, label-sheet, merge, frame evaluation, clinical-scale agreement evaluation, threshold calibration, and model-readiness report tooling are implemented.
No clinician-reviewed validation dataset is committed in this repository.
House-Brackmann, Sunnybrook, and eFACE-style estimates remain Mirror estimates until reviewed assessment labels meet the documented 80% agreement standard.
Production threshold constants should not be changed from calibration reports until reviewed datasets are available.
